recent_calls.summary: The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user, Michael Kimmy, called to check the status of his appointment but the agent could not find any appointment in the system. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user called to request that an e-document be resent to their email. The agent acknowledged the request and confirmed it would be passed on to the team for processing. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.
The agent repeatedly attempted to engage the user, Venkatesh, but the user's audio was unintelligible and no clear communication occurred. The call ended without any resolution or service request.
No conversation happened.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another representative.
The user called to inquire about the ETA of a technician visit. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to reschedule a service appointment to Monday and clarified that the service was not related to a home warranty. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to inquire about the whereabouts of Mr. Patrick. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent who could provide further help. The call was successfully transferred shortly after it began.

The user called to check on the status of an appointment they had requested the previous day. The agent confirmed the business hours and attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred to another agent.

Diana from American Home Shield called to schedule a dispatch appointment for a homeowner's leaking and non-cooling air conditioning unit. The agent collected all necessary details including contact information, service address, and referral source, and informed that Budget would reach out soon to confirm the appointment. The user declined additional maintenance program information and provided positive feedback on the call experience.

The user called to get estimates on air conditioning units and requested a free in-home quote. The agent collected the user's details, including name, address, and service preferences, and attempted to book an appointment for Monday at 12 PM, but the booking system returned an error. The agent assured the user that a human agent would follow up to confirm the appointment.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to be connected to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another number. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user, Judith Hohlt, called to check if she had an appointment scheduled for the day. The virtual assistant confirmed her identity and contact information but found no appointment. Judith requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

Douglas Taube called to schedule a repair for his air conditioning blower and to discuss getting a new AC and furnace. The agent confirmed his details and booked an appointment for Monday, July 6th at 12 PM. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback and the agent confirming the booking and next steps.

The user called and was connected to a voicemail after a brief exchange. The agent identified herself as Sophie from Budget and mentioned the call was about account updates on QuickBooks, but the user did not complete the conversation.

The user called to schedule an AC repair service as a standard service request. The agent collected all necessary details including the user's name, address, issue description, and preferred appointment time. The agent offered available appointment slots, but the user declined and ended the call.
The user called to schedule an AC repair and provided their ZIP code. The call ended abruptly after the user repeated their request to schedule the repair without further interaction.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user returned a call from Budget and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak to a person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.
The user requested to be connected to a representative regarding their AC. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Larry Fox, called to report an urgent issue with his central cooling unit that stopped working. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the information, and informed Larry that a technician would be contacting him shortly. Larry also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.
The user requested to speak to a person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Jennifer Taylor called to request emergency commercial plumbing service for a water heater that was not producing enough heat. The agent collected all necessary details and confirmed the service request for the same day. Jennifer declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended with the agent confirming that someone would contact her shortly.

The user, Chipo, called to schedule an urgent appointment for an AC breakdown. The agent documented the issue as urgent and informed Chipo that the team would follow up on the next business day since it was outside regular hours. The call ended with the user confirming the details and no further assistance requested.

The user called to schedule a plumbing service appointment for their sump pump, which has been making loud vibration noises intermittently. The agent confirmed the details, updated the user's callback number, and scheduled the earliest available appointment. The user declined information about maintenance programs and did not provide feedback on the AI assistant.

The user, Alvia, reported that her air conditioning unit is still not working after a technician visit and requested a follow-up service appointment for the next morning between 8 AM and 12 PM. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and contact number, and noted that this is a follow-up for the same issue. The call ended with the agent assuring that the team will follow up to confirm the appointment.

Judith called about an urgent air conditioning issue at her home, mentioning she has a newborn and the AC was still cooling despite being turned off. The agent marked the request as an emergency and assured Judith that the team would prioritize her case and contact her on the next business day. The call ended with confirmation of contact details and no further requests from Judith.

The user, Jennifer Taylor, called about an emergency plumbing issue involving no hot water from Noritz tankless water heaters at a commercial location in Saint Louis. The agent documented the emergency and prioritized it for the team to follow up the next business day, explaining that no immediate callback was possible due to after-hours. The call ended with the user understanding the situation and no further requests.

Rick called to report that his air handler, replaced earlier that day, was not cooling his home properly despite running all day. The agent collected his service address and contact information, confirmed the issue as a cooling problem, and scheduled a service appointment for the next business day. Rick declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Jamie, called to schedule a cooling system service appointment due to the system not cooling below 75 degrees. The agent confirmed the issue, appointment time for tomorrow at 8 AM, and updated the service address to 431 Keeney Drive, Saint Charles, Missouri. The agent assured Jamie that the team would follow up next business day to confirm availability.

Robin Faulkner called to inquire about the cost of a routine HVAC maintenance service for their air conditioning unit. The agent took a detailed message including contact information and service preferences, and confirmed that the team would reach out to schedule the service and provide pricing information. Robin also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

The user called to inquire about getting the refrigerant in their AC unit checked during a service appointment. The agent confirmed it was not an emergency and asked for the user's full name to proceed.

Deana called to report that her AC unit's fan is not working and requested emergency assistance due to high temperatures and the presence of an older adult with congestive heart failure in the home. The agent documented the emergency, collected the service address and contact information, and escalated the issue for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the agent assuring Deana that the team will contact her soon.

The user, Juan, called to schedule a cooling service for a thermostat issue that prevents the condenser from turning on. The agent confirmed the service details, address, and contact information, and informed Juan that the team will confirm availability the next business day. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information.

The user called to inquire about the scheduling of their AC unit installation. The agent informed the user that the exact date could not be confirmed after hours but assured that the team would contact them on the next business day to schedule the earliest possible installation. The user declined further assistance and the call ended.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to inquire about financing options, specifically about the Okinus provider and discrepancies in monthly payment quotes. The agent provided general information about financing options and assured the user that the team would follow up next business day with specific details and clarification on the monthly payment. The call ended with the agent confirming a follow-up would occur.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.

The user called back after a previous return call and spoke briefly with the after-hours assistant, who offered to take their information for a follow-up. The call ended shortly after without completing the information exchange.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Juan called to request same-day service for a cooling system issue where the thermostat is not turning on the condenser. The agent confirmed the details and informed Juan that no slots were available today, and Juan said he would call back tomorrow if anything changes. The call ended with the user acknowledging and thanking the agent.

The user called to reschedule an appointment set for tomorrow at noon but decided to cancel it instead and will call back when ready to reschedule. The agent confirmed the cancellation and informed the user to mention any specific requests when rescheduling.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live customer service representative as requested. The agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to provide their service address but was unsure of the ZIP code, stating it was the same as the agent's business location. The agent attempted to clarify the ZIP code to proceed with the request, but the call ended before the ZIP code was confirmed or the request was completed.
